patterns.label: Bridge synthesis
patterns.description: Connect two distant bodies of work through a shared abstraction or operator.

patterns.label: Gap exploitation
patterns.description: Identify a known unresolved bottleneck and propose a mechanism that closes it.

patterns.label: Limit extension
patterns.description: Extend a method's regime of validity (scale, dimension, distribution) using a principled correction.

patterns.label: Reframing
patterns.description: Recast a problem in a different mathematical or physical frame that exposes new handles.

patterns.label: Cross-domain transfer
patterns.description: Move a technique from a distant field (e.g. diffusion to optimisation) and adapt it carefully.

patterns.label: Instrumental inversion
patterns.description: Use an instrument or probe in a regime it was not designed for.

patterns.label: Scale jump
patterns.description: Demonstrate that a microscopic or macroscopic principle holds at a drastically different scale.

patterns.label: Constraint lift
patterns.description: Remove a hidden assumption (smoothness, locality, stationarity) and reformulate without it.

patterns.label: Adversarial co-design
patterns.description: Co-evolve a model and a stress-test that targets its weaknesses, iterated until convergence.

patterns.label: Observational bridge
patterns.description: Reconcile two observational signals that were previously thought to disagree.

patterns.label: Energy regularisation
patterns.description: Introduce a conserved quantity or Lyapunov functional that constrains otherwise unstable dynamics.

patterns.label: Data-driven prior
patterns.description: Replace an analytic prior with one learned from data, justified by a measured coverage guarantee.

patterns.label: Spectral decomposition
patterns.description: Re-express a problem in a basis (Fourier, wavelet, Laplace) that decouples interactions.

patterns.label: Symmetry augmentation
patterns.description: Add an explicit symmetry (equivariance, conservation law) to a model and exploit it.

patterns.label: Causal restructure
patterns.description: Re-draw the causal graph to expose a previously hidden lever for intervention.

citations.researchStudioIdea: arXiv:2607.04439 — ResearchStudio-Idea: An Evidence-Grounded Research-Ideation Skill Suite from ML Conference Outcomes (Zhao et al., 2026).
citations.humanLlmGap: arXiv:2607.01233 — Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas (Chen, Zhao, Cohan, 2026).
